text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 24 

MSIS_RFRNC_YR 

LABEL: Medicaid Beneficiary Identifier Reference Year 

DESCRIPTION: Year the MSIS_ID in the AHC file was found in the T-MSIS claims. 

LONG NAME: MSIS_RFRNC_YR 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: CCW 

VALUES: 2018–2022, or 
Null/missing = MSIS_ID was not found in T-MSIS or beneficiary was enrolled in Medicare only and not 
Medicaid 

COMMENT: Earliest year
